identity.name: Díaz & Cía Abogados
identity.target_audience: Individuals in Concepción facing criminal charges, seeking urgent and solid defense.
identity.mission: To provide immediate confidence and robust legal defense with a premium, modern approach.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-24. Avoid cramped sections.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Specialties and Features.
layout_strategy.alignment: Asymmetrical balance. Avoid centering everything. Use left alignment for body text to maintain reading flow.

buttons.default: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.cta: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-xl transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-colors

cards.style: Flat, sharp edges or minimal rounded-lg (rounded-lg).

inputs.style: bg-secondary border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-12

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain/noise overlays on dark backgrounds to avoid flat digital look.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-white/80 for sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered entrance animations (fade-up, stagger).

content.headline: Defensa Penal Estratégica en Concepción.
content.subheadline: Protegemos su libertad y su futuro con un enfoque moderno, riguroso y confidencial.

team.style: Clean, dark text on white cards, no borders, shadow hover.

process.layout: Step-by-step vertical timeline or horizontal cards.

testimonials.style: Minimalist quotes, focus on the emotional relief of the client.

universal_guidelines: Use deep, rich colors for emphasis.
No 'AI slop' aesthetics; keep it sharp and intentional.
Respect the 'E1' persona: bold, architectural, fused disciplines.
